channel.title: pl-interest on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in pl-interest on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes

item.title: Type-Systems for Describing System-on-a-Chip Architectures.
item.description: I am giving a talk about my work on the Border Patrol Project at the University of Edinburgh, School of Informatics, PL-Interest Group. This extends upon my talk from March to the FP-Group at St Andrews with a more complete picture of the language and how it is used. Sadly, this talk won’t be Chalk&Talk, and a more conventional slidedeck will be used. If tempted, I may do live programming.
